entities.name: Regex
entities.context: Pattern matching technique that fails at semantic equivalence tasks

entities.name: Semantic equivalence
entities.context: Understanding that different representations can mean the same thing - core insight driving LLM-over-regex approach

entities.name: Meeting deduplication
entities.context: Process of identifying duplicate meeting files based on semantic identity rather than exact string matching

entities.name: Canonical version selection
entities.context: Choosing the single best file to keep from a group of duplicates based on defined criteria

entities.name: Filename parsing
entities.context: Extracting structured data (title, date, source markers) from meeting filenames

relationships.context: Regex fails because it cannot understand semantic equivalence
Deduplication requires understanding that different filename formats represent the same meeting
First step extracts title, timestamp, source markers from each filename
After grouping duplicates, select one file to keep based on criteria
